data.title: Minimalist Design
data.description: Focus on clean, uncluttered designs aligned with Apple's brand identity.

data.title: High-Quality Imagery
data.description: Emphasizes the use of high-resolution images to showcase products effectively.

data.title: Innovative UI Elements
data.description: Embraces cutting-edge UI elements that reflect Apple's technological prowess.
data.technical_spec: Animation libraries and SVGs for dynamic visuals.

data.title: Consistent Branding
data.description: Maintains a consistent visual and tonal brand presence across all web entities.
data.technical_spec: Brand guidelines adherence, consistent color palettes.

data.title: User-Centric Approach
data.description: Design decisions prioritize user needs and enhance the user experience.
data.technical_spec: User personas and journey maps in design planning.
